title: potentilla × delavayi
intro: Potentilla × delavayi, also known as Delavay's cinquefoil, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, resulting from the cross between Potentilla delavayi and Potentilla tridentata. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla × delavayi include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as arthritis, colds, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine practices, particularly in East Asian cultures.
